query:
SELECT 
  ifa.questionId,
  COUNT(*) as file_count
FROM organizations o
JOIN intakeFileAttachments ifa ON o.id = ifa.organizationId
WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson'
  AND ifa.questionId LIKE 'D.%'
GROUP BY ifa.questionId
ORDER BY ifa.questionId;
